experiences.title: Professional Sabbatical
highlights: Career transition focused on personal and professional development and freelance web development.
Built websites for a small business while expanding expertise in Astro, Laravel, GSAP, AWS, software architecture, and system design through hands-on projects and continuous learning.
Leveraged tools including Claude and Gemini to accelerate development while maintaining engineering quality through human review.

experiences.title: Fullstack Software Engineer
highlights: Delivered production-grade full-stack software for high-scale SaaS products using React, Node.js, TypeScript, GraphQL, Kubernetes, PostgreSQL, Elasticsearch, and GCP.
Partnered with cross-functional engineering teams to design, implement, deploy, and maintain reliable production systems.
Served as Technical Lead for the Salesloft Mobile application, using React Native, Zustand, and TypeScript.

experiences.title: Fullstack Software Engineer
highlights: Worked on a project for an international e-learning platform using React, Redux, GraphQL, and a backend supported by Node.js and Express, as well as AWS Lambda, AWS S3, Amazon DynamoDB, and PostgreSQL.

experiences.title: Frontend Developer
highlights: Worked closely with Product Managers to define the strategy and implement a website redesign for the legal branch of a well-known news agency, using React, Redux, and the Foundation CSS Framework.
Built internal tools using Node.js, Express, and Puppeteer to automate the QA process for an Angular 2 project.
